seed_instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals.
org_constraint: The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email should consist of 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least four sentences.
instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals. The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email should consist of 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least four sentences.
response:
Dear Professor Smith, I am writing to introduce myself as a student in your upcoming course. I am currently majoring in Biology with a focus on genetics. My academic journey has been driven by a passion for cellular research. I am very eager to learn from your expertise this semester.

My primary goal is to master the complex theories of molecular biology. I hope to eventually pursue a career in medical research. I am particularly interested in how gene editing can treat diseases. I want to develop strong laboratory skills under your guidance.

I look forward to participating actively in every class session. Please let me know if there are extra resources I should review. I am excited to begin this academic journey with you. Thank you for your time and consideration of my goals.<turn|>
